Developer Hub

Integration guides, configs, and commands for building on Sovereign L1

Integration Guides

Verification

Verify contract source

MetaMask — Add Network (via window.ethereum)

Run this script inside your web application to prompt users to add Sovereign L1 to MetaMask.

await window.ethereum.request({
  method: 'wallet_addEthereumChain',
  params: [{
    chainId: '0x1E61',           // 7777 in hex
    chainName: 'Sovereign L1',
    nativeCurrency: { name: 'SLT', symbol: 'SLT', decimals: 18 },
    rpcUrls: ['http://localhost:8545'],
    blockExplorerUrls: ['http://localhost:3000/evm']
  }]
});

Network Parameters

EVM Chain ID7777 (0x1E61)
Cosmos Chain IDsovereign-1
EVM RPC (HTTP)http://localhost:8545
Cosmos RPC (CometBFT)http://localhost:26657
Cosmos gRPClocalhost:9090
Native TokenSOV (uSLT)
Local Devnet RPC endpoints. Use these configs in your scripts or configuration files to connect and sign.
